creator: freebsd@ruka.org
text: Also, I had intended to include a link to a similar change in the Linux kernel, https://github.com/torvalds/linux/commit/96e0bf4b5193d0d97d139f99e2dd128763d55521 (Although the comments there say this behavior is consistent with the RFC, I don't think it is consistent however, the RFC says, "If the ACK acks something not yet sent (SEG.ACK > SND.NXT) then send an ACK, drop the segment, and return.")
